question_text: Will the Federal Reserve hold rates steady at the January 2025 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Federal Reserve maintains the federal funds target rate unchanged at the January 28-29, 2025 FOMC meeting.

question_text: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates at the March 2025 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Federal Reserve announces a decrease in the federal funds rate target range at the March 18-19, 2025 FOMC meeting.

question_text: Will US CPI year-over-year inflation remain above 2.5% in January 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Bureau of Labor Statistics reports US CPI-U year-over-year change for January 2025 is 2.5% or higher.

question_text: Will the federal funds rate be cut to below 4.0% by March 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the federal funds rate target range upper bound is below 4.0% after the March 2025 FOMC meeting.

question_text: Will the 10-year US Treasury yield exceed 4.5% at any point in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the 10-year US Treasury yield closes above 4.50% on any trading day in Q1 2025.

question_text: Will US unemployment exceed 5.0% in any month of Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if BLS reports the seasonally-adjusted US unemployment rate at 5.0% or higher for any month January-March 2025.

question_text: Will the ECB cut its deposit facility rate at the January 2025 meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the European Central Bank announces a reduction in the deposit facility rate at the January 2025 Governing Council meeting.

question_text: Will the Bank of Japan raise its policy rate before April 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the Bank of Japan raises its short-term policy rate at any meeting before April 1, 2025.

question_text: Will US core PCE inflation fall below 2.0% YoY by February 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the BEA reports core PCE price index year-over-year change for February 2025 is below 2.0%.

question_text: Will the S&P 500 close above 6000 at any point in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the S&P 500 index closes above 6000 on any trading day during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Trump sign executive orders on immigration within his first week in office?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if President Trump signs at least one executive order related to immigration policy within his first seven days in office (by January 27, 2025).

question_text: Will the US impose new tariffs on Chinese goods in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US government announces or implements new tariff increases specifically on Chinese imports during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will TikTok be banned or forced to complete a divestiture in the US by March 31, 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if TikTok is either banned from US app stores or ByteDance completes a divestiture of TikTok's US operations by March 31, 2025.

question_text: Will Ukraine and Russia begin formal peace negotiations before April 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if official representatives of both Ukraine and Russia participate in formal, publicly acknowledged peace or ceasefire negotiations before April 1, 2025.

question_text: Will the US withdraw from the Paris Climate Agreement in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US formally initiates withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement or signs an executive order directing withdrawal during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Germany hold a snap federal election before April 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Germany holds a federal election (Bundestagswahl) before April 1, 2025, following the collapse of the coalition government.

question_text: Will the CDU/CSU win the most seats in the February 2025 German federal election?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the CDU/CSU alliance wins the most seats in the Bundestag in the February 2025 German federal election.

question_text: Will Canadian PM Justin Trudeau resign or announce his resignation before April 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Justin Trudeau announces his resignation as leader of the Liberal Party or as Prime Minister before April 1, 2025.

question_text: Will Israel and Hamas reach a ceasefire agreement before March 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Israel and Hamas agree to a ceasefire deal (temporary or permanent) that is publicly announced before March 1, 2025.

question_text: Will any Trump cabinet nominee be formally rejected by a Senate vote in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the US Senate votes to reject (not confirm) any Trump cabinet-level nominee during Q1 2025. Voluntary withdrawals before a vote do not count.

question_text: Will DeepSeek release an open-source AI model matching GPT-4 performance on major benchmarks before March 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if DeepSeek releases an open-weight model that scores within 5% of GPT-4 on at least two of MMLU, HumanEval, or MATH benchmarks before March 1, 2025.

question_text: Will OpenAI release a new reasoning model (o-series) in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if OpenAI publicly releases a new model in its o-series (o3, o3-mini, or similar reasoning-focused model) during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Nvidia's market capitalization exceed $3 trillion at any point in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Nvidia's market capitalization exceeds $3 trillion at market close on any trading day during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Google release Gemini 2.0 before April 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Google publicly releases or announces a model called Gemini 2.0 before April 1, 2025.

question_text: Will Bitcoin exceed $100,000 at any point in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Bitcoin (BTC/USD) trades above $100,000 on any exchange tracked by CoinGecko at any point during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Bitcoin fall below $50,000 at any point in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Bitcoin (BTC/USD) trades below $50,000 on any major exchange at any point during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will Tesla deliver more than 1.7 million vehicles globally in 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if Tesla reports total global vehicle deliveries exceeding 1,700,000 units for full-year 2024.

question_text: Will any major US bank (top 20 by assets) fail in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if any US bank ranked in the top 20 by total assets is closed by regulators or enters FDIC receivership during Q1 2025.

question_text: Will the S&P 500 enter a bear market (decline >20% from peak) in Q1 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolved YES if the S&P 500 declines more than 20% from its most recent all-time high at any point during Q1 2025.
